No other appearances in the matter.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff With James Y. Soong, M.D. is GRANTED. Defendants are entitled to the independent medical examination. If it cannot be conducted before the trial, the parties are entitled to conduct it during the trial.
